title: Review and merge: BIN-64
description:
## Summary

Code review complete for BIN-64 (corkboard scene planning feature). All critical and major issues have been resolved in revision commit.

**Feature:** Add corkboard-style scene cards for story planning

**Branch:** `ticket/BIN-64`

**Status:** ✅ Approved by Code Reviewer

## Review outcome

- All critical state management issues fixed (stale state bug eliminated)
- All major performance and UX issues fixed (controlled loading, correct DnD strategy)
- Build passes with zero TypeScript errors
- Strong accessibility, design system compliance, and code quality
- No blocking issues remain

## PR / Compare link

https://github.com/tmat06/story-writing-app/compare/main...ticket/BIN-64

## Commits to merge

- `413ae2c` - Fix state sync, performance, and DnD strategy (BIN-64 revisions)
- `e543935` - Add corkboard-style scene cards for story planning (BIN-64)

## Files changed

12 files total (888 additions, 28 deletions):
- 8 new files (Corkboard, SceneCard, ViewModeSwitch components + types + lib)
- 2 modified files (story page + CSS)
- 2 package files (@dnd-kit dependencies)

## Next step

Review the PR/compare link above and merge `ticket/BIN-64` to `main` when ready.

Original issue: [BIN-64](/BIN/issues/BIN-64)

comment.body: Routing clarification: merge ticket has no valid standalone handoff directive and no assignee. Assigned to Code Reviewer to complete board merge handoff metadata (board user assignee + in_review) per Definition of Done.
